title: Newscatcher Search Response
description: Schema for the search response returned by the Newscatcher News API v3 /api/search endpoint.

status.description: Status of the response (ok or error).
enum: No matches for your search parameters

total_hits.description: The total number of articles matching the search query.

total_pages.description: The total number of pages available.

page_size.description: The number of articles returned per page.

articles.description: The list of articles matching the search criteria.

user_input.description: Echo of the user's input parameters.

clusters_count.description: The number of article clusters returned (when clustering is enabled).

clusters.description: Article clusters (returned when clustering_enabled is true).

ClusterEntity.description: A cluster of related articles grouped by topic similarity.

cluster_id.description: The unique identifier for the cluster.

cluster_size.description: The number of articles in the cluster.

articles.description: The articles belonging to this cluster.
